brief_html: Null/keepalive packet. Sent by the client to the server to keep the connection alive when there is no other activity.
remarks_html:
This packet is used as a keepalive mechanism. The client sends this when there is no other traffic to prevent the server from timing out the connection.

Both client and server may send this packet; the recipient should not respond to it.

comments.content_html: This packet is documented in multiple sources and is consistent across all BNCS-based games.
